title: Birds to face Royal Blues
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Former Safa Eden...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Former Safa Eden Region champions Oriented Birds FC will lock horns with Royal Blues in a Western Cape ABC Motsepe Provincial League encounter on Saturday 1 February at Rustdene Stadium in Beaufort West.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Former Safa Eden Region champions Oriented Birds FC will lock horns with Royal Blues in a Western Cape ABC Motsepe Provincial League encounter on Saturday 1 February at Rustdene Stadium in Beaufort West."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The high-flying Birds will be looking for a positive result from their first game of the new year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Birds entered the Provincial League in the 2023/24 season - this is the second season that the Kwanokuthula-based side are in the semi-professional league.","html":"The Birds entered the Provincial League in the 2023/24 season - this is the second season that the Kwanokuthula-based side are in the semi-professional league."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"So far, the Birds have played nine games, registering five victories, two draws and two losses - scoring 19 goals and conceding 12.","html":"So far, the Birds have played nine games, registering five victories, two draws and two losses - scoring 19 goals and conceding 12."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Head coach","html":"Head coach"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Oriented Birds' head coach Welcome Qalanto played for the likes of Chippa United, Mpumalanga Black Aces, Golden Arrows and Steenberg United.","html":"Oriented Birds' head coach Welcome Qalanto played for the likes of Chippa United, Mpumalanga Black Aces, Golden Arrows and Steenberg United."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Qalanto told the Knysna-Plett Herald that \"I feel good to be back on the field of play. The boys are looking very good and are ready for the challenges in the Provincial League\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"'Ready for game'","html":"'Ready for game'"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He added that prior to the festive season holidays he had sat down with the players and given them a programme to follow while they were having a break.","html":"He added that prior to the festive season holidays he had sat down with the players and given them a programme to follow while they were having a break."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He emphasised that playing away from home \"is always a mountain to climb, but as the team they (players) are more than ready for the game\".","html":"He emphasised that playing away from home \"is always a mountain to climb, but as the team they (players) are more than ready for the game\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
